text.title: Text
text.default: Welcome to BruControl, I'm Bella, your personal text to speech assistant.

speak.title: Speak
speak.description: Set true to play cached audio. Resets to false when playback ends.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: ElevenLabs xi-api-key. Stored in element data (visible to anyone with dashboard access). Prefer a proxy for production.

voiceId.title: Voice ID
voiceId.description: Voice ID from ElevenLabs (Profile → Voices, or API). Required.

outputFormat.title: Output format
outputFormat.description: Query output_format (e.g. mp3_44100_128, mp3_22050_32). See ElevenLabs docs for your plan tier.
